ggwindrose 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

ggwindrose: Wind Rose Geom for 'ggplot2'

Source: R/ggwindrose-package.R
ggwindrose-package.Rd

Extends 'ggplot2' with a wind rose geom that bins wind direction and speed observations into a direction-by-speed frequency table using a custom Stat/Geom pair. Coordinate, scale, and theme helpers are provided to produce publication-ready wind roses following meteorological conventions (North at 12 o'clock, clockwise rotation). A custom guide (guide_windrose()) renders the calm-wind percentage below the legend.

Core functions

FunctionDescription
geom_windrose()Wind rose layer (main entry point)
stat_windrose()Underlying stat (direction × speed binning)
coord_windrose()Polar coordinates: North up, clockwise
scale_x_windrose()Compass-point x-axis labels
scale_fill_windrose()Speed-class fill scale
guide_windrose()Legend with calm-% footer
windrose_calm_pct()Format calm % as a string
theme_windrose()Opt-in minimal theme adjustments

Minimal example

library(ggplot2)
set.seed(1)
df <- data.frame(wdir = sample(0:359, 500, replace = TRUE),
                 wspd = c(rep(0, 30), rexp(470, 0.2)))

ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +
  geom_windrose() +
  coord_windrose() +
  scale_x_windrose() +
  scale_fill_windrose(
    name  = "Speed (m/s)",
    guide = guide_windrose(calm_text = windrose_calm_pct(df$wspd))
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme_windrose()
